title: Green Angellights
content:
Green angel lights
    stream from the willow tree,
    in direct symmetrical bearing
    three birds are drawn to it.

    In gold, soft patches
    of light overreach
    the earth,
    shadows trace ridges
    to surround each teak blown colour.

    With fakir lowliness,
    the throb of water
    takes petals from
    the sun,
    shimmers its passing breath
    to a euphony sobbing
    in movement.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Green Angellights"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
